calls.context: root should stay clean; tools can fetch one pretty-printed index from the devlog state directory

calls.text: Use local .devlog YAML as the canonical project state
calls.context: devlog is a meta state engine that must travel with cloned repos and work without external services
calls.facing: agents need durable situational awareness across sessions and providers
calls.to_achieve: local-first operation, readable diffs, and project state that travels with the code
calls.tradeoff: external portfolio consumers need a generated index rather than querying normalized storage

calls.text: Use git commits as the audit trail for every devlog write
calls.context: devlog state is plain YAML and generated context files inside the project repo
calls.facing: state changes must be reviewable and attributable over time
calls.to_achieve: human-readable historical record through normal git tooling
calls.tradeoff: each CLI write creates commit noise that must be managed intentionally

calls.text: Derive devlog entry schemas from established frameworks
calls.context: agent drift is prevented by structured fields rather than vague command names
calls.facing: decisions, blockers, pivots, handoffs, goals, architecture, constraints, and debt need different semantics
calls.to_achieve: meaningful L1/L2/L3 project state that agents can interpret reliably
calls.tradeoff: the schema is richer than casual note taking and needs progressive disclosure

calls.text: Use progressive disclosure for the CLI interface
calls.context: users and agents should get value from text-only commands while richer context remains available through flags
calls.facing: full schemas can create cognitive load if every field appears mandatory
over: mandatory full forms for every command
calls.to_achieve: day-one usability without losing structured meaning for advanced entries
calls.tradeoff: some entries will be sparse and AGENTS.md must degrade gracefully

calls.text: Use final v0.3 command names without deprecated aliases
calls.context: the tool has no external users yet and compatibility does not matter more than vocabulary clarity
calls.facing: v0.2 names mixed implementation labels with conceptual schema names
calls.to_achieve: a clean command surface: note, call, calls, snag, clear, brief, log, orient, shift, arch, constraint, debt
calls.tradeoff: local scripts using v0.2 command names will break

calls.text: Keep the Python package at the repository root as devlog
calls.context: the package is small and the user explicitly preferred not adding a src/devlog nesting layer
calls.facing: production packaging benefits from src layout but project simplicity matters now
calls.to_achieve: simple repository structure while retaining the import package name devlog
calls.tradeoff: tests need configuration discipline so imports do not mask packaging issues

snags.text: ROADMAP.md documents milestone and timeline commands but the CLI does not implement them yet
snags.blocks: claiming v0.3.0 fully matches the current roadmap command reference

shifts.from: central portfolio repository with markdown project files
shifts.to: local-first .devlog YAML inside each project repository
shifts.intended: make developer journey state durable and portfolio-friendly
shifts.actual: central storage made project context less portable and added unnecessary coupling
shifts.assumption_broke: one career index should own project state
shifts.sustain: portfolio remains a consumer through generated JSON

shifts.intended: give portfolio tools one fetchable JSON document
shifts.actual: root-level generated files clutter the project and duplicate devlog-owned state
shifts.assumption_broke: portfolio export must live at the repository root
shifts.sustain: keep the export pretty-printed and committed for simple raw URL consumers

shifts.from: v0.2 compatibility aliases with deprecation warnings
shifts.to: breaking v0.3 final command names only
shifts.intended: avoid breaking existing users while moving toward the roadmap vocabulary
shifts.actual: there are no external users yet, so compatibility adds noise without benefit
shifts.assumption_broke: aliases are needed before first public use
shifts.sustain: tests assert the exposed command surface directly

debt.text: edit command is intentionally thinly tested because it execs into an editor
debt.interest: coverage report leaves a small CLI branch gap and regressions around editor invocation would be manual
debt.principal: extract target resolution into a helper and test without os.execlp

debt.text: v0.4 intelligence rendering is not implemented yet
debt.interest: AGENTS.md uses existing sections but does not yet provide the full explicit L1/L2/L3 structure promised by the roadmap
debt.principal: rebuild AGENTS.md, standup, and orient around perception, comprehension, and projection

debt.text: README and ROADMAP need a final pass after deciding milestone and timeline scope
debt.interest: docs can drift while v0.3 command surface is still settling
debt.principal: align command reference, examples, and version roadmap with implemented commands

relationships: CLI validates Typer commands and writes Pydantic models to YAML
generators rebuild AGENTS.md and index.json from YAML
storage auto-adds .devlog and AGENTS.md to git commits
pytest exercises CLI through isolated temp repos
arch.intent: v0.4 will enrich AGENTS.md with explicit L1/L2/L3 intelligence using the richer v0.3 schemas

constraints.text: devlog must remain local-first with no database or required network service
constraints.impact: all state must be represented as files under .devlog/ plus generated local artifacts

constraints.text: generated portfolio/tool export must stay inside .devlog/index.json
constraints.impact: root DEVLOG.json is obsolete; external consumers should fetch .devlog/index.json

constraints.text: test coverage gate must run through pytest-cov with at least 80 percent total coverage
constraints.impact: new features need tests or the default pytest command fails

notes.text: Added pytest coverage for v0.2.0 CLI behavior: init, goals, logs, decisions, blockers, handoff, standup, validate, export, and git commits
Expanded v0.2.0 test suite to 23 tests with coverage reporting, 95.28% total coverage, CI workflow, and obsolete Markdown parser removal
Switched CLI and tests to v0.3.0 final command paradigm with note/call/calls/snag/clear/brief/log/orient plus shift, arch, constraint, and debt
v0.2.0 foundation shipped: local .devlog YAML storage, generated AGENTS.md and .devlog/index.json, all Pydantic models, init-based setup, and central repo dependencies removed
v0.3.0 schema work implemented in code: final command names, richer call/snag/brief/goal fields, and new shift/arch/constraint/debt commands

briefs.situation: Project devlog has been populated with roadmap-aligned v0.3 state: aim, calls, shifts, architecture, constraints, snags, debt, and shipped notes
briefs.background: The codebase currently implements the final v0.3 command names and 26 tests with 95.72 percent coverage, while ROADMAP.md also mentions future milestone/timeline commands
briefs.assessment: The main mismatch is that milestone/timeline are documented in ROADMAP.md but not implemented in the CLI; this is now logged as a high-impact snag
briefs.recommendation: Decide whether milestone/timeline belong in v0.3.0 before tagging; otherwise move them to a later roadmap section and clear the snag

aims.text: finish v0.3.0 schema release and prepare v0.4.0 intelligence
aims.horizon: final command names, rich schema entries, .devlog/index.json export, tests and CI green, roadmap gaps made explicit
aims.risk: ROADMAP.md now mentions milestone/timeline but the CLI does not implement them yet
aims.next_decision: whether milestone/timeline belong in v0.3.0 or move to a later release

milestones.summary: Standalone devlog CLI extracted with old command names and markdown-era assumptions
Local-first .devlog YAML storage, generated AGENTS.md and .devlog/index.json, Pydantic models, init workflow, and obsolete parser removal
Final command names, rich schemas, shift/arch/constraint/debt/milestone/timeline commands, coverage gate, and CI
Planned AGENTS.md, standup, and orient rewrite around explicit L1 perception, L2 comprehension, and L3 projection
Planned cleanup release for migration helper, deprecated-removal aftermath, and clean install verification
